criteria_audit.evidence: frontend/src/components/settings/SettingsSubscriptionTab.tsx — data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHYYc (panel), ai_RNbBHYYd (current card), ai_RNbBHYYm (plans grid), ai_RNbBHYYw (billing card); nested markers ai_RNbBHYYe–ai_RNbBHYYl, ai_RNbBHYYx/ai_RNbBHYYy, ai_RNbBHYZA–ai_RNbBHYZC in routes.ts + tab component; mounted from SettingsMain.tsx subscription tab panel ai_RNbBHYYc
criteria_audit.notes: Brownfield target is SettingsSubscriptionTab.tsx (not .vue). Hierarchy matches IR: panel → current card + RG grid + billing card under ai_RNbBHYYc.

criteria_audit.evidence: frontend/src/lib/settings/subscriptionApi.ts loadSubscriptionPlans() queries subscription_plan then falls back to PLANS catalog; frontend/src/components/settings/SubscriptionPlanCard.tsx renders name/price/features; getCurrentTierLabel() uses ENUM-04 getTierSubscriptionLabel on current-tier badge (ai_RNbBHYYj/ai_RNbBHYYl)
criteria_audit.notes: IR binds ai_RNbBHYYm to custom.subscriptionplan search, but prototype Supabase types/migrations define only profiles/journal_entries — no subscription_plan table. Runtime always uses static PLANS fallback, so cells do not actually source from the table. Plan card name chips use catalog names (coincide with ENUM-04 labels) but are not explicitly mapped through tier_os helpers.

criteria_audit.evidence: selectSubscriptionPlan() updates profiles.subscribed via supabase.from('profiles').update; plan-free-select ai_RNbBHYYv wired in SubscriptionPlanCard.tsx; billing-update ai_RNbBHYZB and billing-invoices ai_RNbBHYZC call supabase.rpc('open_billing_portal') / list_billing_invoices in subscriptionApi.ts but handlers catch errors and show demo toasts in SettingsSubscriptionTab.tsx
criteria_audit.notes: Plan select is functionally wired to an existing prototype surface (profiles.subscribed). Billing RPCs are invoked in code but absent from frontend/src/integrations/supabase/types.ts Functions and frontend/supabase/migrations — no project/ tree exists to supply them. Billing CTAs degrade to informational demo toasts, not end-to-end billing outcomes.

functional_audit.check: Settings → Subscription tab renders full panel (current plan, plan grid, billing card) — not stub/placeholder
Plan select (free/pro) persists subscription state for authenticated user via Supabase
Plan grid loads name/price/features from subscriptionplan table rows
billing-update-btn (ai_RNbBHYZB) opens a working billing portal surface
evidence: frontend/src/components/settings/SettingsSubscriptionTab.tsx — catch → 'Demo mode: billing isn't connected yet.'

functional_audit.check: billing-invoices-btn (ai_RNbBHYZC) retrieves invoice history via Supabase billing surface
evidence: frontend/src/components/settings/SettingsSubscriptionTab.tsx — catch → 'Demo mode: invoice history isn't available yet.'

ui_evidence.evidence: SettingsSubscriptionTab.tsx root div data-bubble-id=ai_RNbBHYYc; parent panel id from SETTINGS_TAB_PANEL_BUBBLE_IDS.subscription
Current-plan summary card with Group_card_muted_ style and nested header/badge children
p data-bubble-id=ai_RNbBHYYh — 'Manage your plan and billing preferences.'
tier badge span data-bubble-id=ai_RNbBHYYj with ENUM-04 label in ai_RNbBHYYl child
Plans grid div data-bubble-id=ai_RNbBHYYm uses CSS grid md:grid-cols-3; layout_notes specify RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref but bubbleStyle('RepeatingGroup_list_') not applied
SubscriptionPlanCard.tsx template root data-bubble-id=ai_RNbBHYYn repeated per plan (RG cell pattern)
Billing card div data-bubble-id=ai_RNbBHYYw with Group_card_muted_
Plan select button data-bubble-id=ai_RNbBHYYv on each SubscriptionPlanCard CTA (RG template id reuse)
Button data-bubble-id=ai_RNbBHYZB 'Update payment method' with onClick→requestBillingPortal

gaps: subscription_plan table referenced in subscriptionApi.ts and IR data_binding (custom.subscriptionplan) is not present in prototype Supabase migrations or generated types
open_billing_portal and list_billing_invoices RPCs are called but undefined in prototype schema — billing buttons cannot complete real workflows
Plans grid (ai_RNbBHYYm) omits RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref noted in decompose layout_notes
Extra demo disclaimer paragraphs in SettingsSubscriptionTab.tsx are not IR-static copy
Premium coaching CTA uses mailto: in dialog — acceptable for contact flow but outside AC-3 billing buttons scope

critiques.summary: Billing CTAs invoke non-existent RPCs and always degrade to demo toasts, failing AC-3 billing half and functional rubric for API-backed actions.
critiques.suggested_fix: Add frontend/supabase migration + edge function stubs for open_billing_portal / list_billing_invoices (or document dependency gap in scope and gate buttons until backend exists); surface RPC errors only when truly unavailable.

critiques.summary: loadSubscriptionPlans always falls back to static PLANS because subscription_plan table is missing from prototype schema, so AC-2 table-sourcing is not met at runtime.
critiques.suggested_fix: Add subscription_plan migration/seed aligned with ENUM-04 tier rows (or read from adminPlansApi static path with explicit isStatic flag) and remove silent catalog fallback when AC requires table rows.

critiques.summary: RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref from layout_notes not applied on ai_RNbBHYYm grid.
critiques.suggested_fix: Apply bubbleStyle('RepeatingGroup_list_') to the plans grid container alongside responsive grid layout.

critiques.summary: Coverage preflight is present with reuse_decision extend and mapped Subscription.tsx reference; matches actual extend-in-place approach.
critiques.suggested_fix: No change required; keep SettingsSubscriptionTab as canonical settings consumer per mapped_target_files note.
